heading: Army Reserve: composition
label: 10104 Army Reserve: composition
text: The Army Reserve includes all Reserves of the Army who are not members of the Army National Guard of the United States.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 3076 of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(3)(A)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
